Centre for Trade Excellence

Resilient foundations for a secure future

Acting knowledgeably and building a safer world through responsible international best practices and norms.

insights
The Trade-Technology Nexus and Economic Security in Asia-Pacific
Expert reflections on trade, technology and economic security challenges shaping the region.

Introducing The Diplomat Series
A New Forum for Honest Dialogue and Collective Action
The Diplomat Series is our response to that need: a forum for honest dialogue and collective action.

TE co-hosted the Global Trade Congress 2025

JOIN TE

our leaders

TE is spearheaded by veterans in their fields who are driven by a passion to achieve excellence. Together with an experienced team of subject matter experts, they have come together to make this vision a reality.
